nodes.name: Sporophila
nodes.summary: Sporophila（Sporophila）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联36种鸟类，如Lined seedeater、White-bellied seedeater、Parrot-billed seedeater等36种鸟类。

nodes.name: Parrot-billed seedeater
nodes.summary: Parrot-billed seedeater（Sporophila peruviana）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Parrot-billed seedeater。

nodes.name: Parrot-billed seedeater
nodes.summary: The parrot-billed seedeater (Sporophila peruviana) is a small species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in various shrubby habitats in western Ecuador and western Peru. Outside the breeding season, it is quite social and frequently seen in flocks with other small seed-eating birds. References External links Images at ADW
